steps.title: Use the repeated value
steps.content: The table shows $f(22)=-10$ and $f(28)=-10$. The product $(x-22)(x-28)$ is $0$ at both of those inputs, so subtracting $10$ gives the needed output.

steps.title: Check the third value
steps.content:
Test the expression at $x=30$:
$$
(30-22)(30-28)-10=(8)(2)-10=6
$$
This matches the table.

steps.title: Select the equation
steps.content: The function is $$ f(x)=(x-22)(x-28)-10 $$ The answer is B.
